management.sharedRole: provides governance, planning, operations, finance, people, risk, assets, projects, AI and performance management to every branch
management.standaloneRole: provides complete entity management and Management-as-a-Service for internal and external entities
management.inheritanceRule: product branches inherit management capabilities and add only domain-specific workflows

trading.sharedRole: provides listing, bidding, barter, auction, negotiation, escrow and settlement capabilities across products
trading.standaloneRole: CAPITAL provides specialist multi-market trading and Trading-as-a-Service
